error.instance_not_found: Instance '%{name}' not found in project '%{project}'. Run `coast ls` to see available instances.
error.instance_already_exists: Instance '%{name}' already exists in project '%{project}'. Run `coast rm %{name}` first or choose a different name.
error.dangling_container:
A dangling Docker container '%{container_name}' was found for instance '%{name}' in project '%{project}', but no matching instance exists in the Coast database. This is likely left over from a previous failed run or interrupted removal.
To remove it and proceed, re-run with --force-remove-dangling:
  coast run %{name} --force-remove-dangling
error.invalid_language: Unsupported language '%{code}'. Supported languages: en, zh, ja, ko, ru, pt, es.
error.daemon_not_running: coastd is not running. Start it with: coast daemon start
error.daemon_connect_failed: Failed to connect to coastd at %{path}: %{message}
error.daemon_closed: coastd closed the connection without responding. The daemon may have crashed.
cli.build.about: Build a coast image from a Coastfile
cli.rerun_extractors.about: Re-run secret extractors using the cached build Coastfile
cli.run.about: Create and start a new coast instance
cli.rm_build.about: Remove a project's build artifact and associated Docker resources
cli.checkout.about: Check out an instance (bind canonical ports to it)
cli.ports.about: Show port allocations for an instance
cli.ports.set_primary.about: Mark a service as the primary for this instance
cli.docker.about: Run a docker command inside a coast instance's inner daemon
cli.exec.about: Execute a command inside a coast container
cli.logs.about: Stream logs from a coast instance
cli.lookup.about: Find coast instances for your current worktree
cli.lookup.no_instances: No coast instances assigned to worktree '%{worktree}' (%{project}).
cli.lookup.no_instances_root: No coast instances on project root (%{project}).
cli.assign.about: Assign a worktree to an existing coast instance (fast branch switch)
cli.unassign.about: Return an instance to the repo's default branch
cli.rebuild.about: Rebuild images and restart services inside a coast instance
cli.archive.about: Archive a project (stop instances/services, hide from list)
cli.unarchive.about: Unarchive a project (restore to main list)
cli.builds.docker_images.about: List Docker images in a build
cli.builds.compose.about: Show the compose file for a build
cli.builds.coastfile.about: Show the Coastfile for a build
cli.mcp.about: Inspect MCP server configuration and tools
cli.mcp.ls.about: List declared MCP servers and their status
cli.mcp.tools.about: List tools exposed by an MCP server
cli.mcp.locations.about: Show MCP client config file locations
cli.doctor.about: Diagnose and repair orphaned state (missing containers)
cli.ui.about: Open the Coast dashboard in your browser
cli.dns.setup.about: Configure macOS to resolve *.localcoast via coastd
cli.dns.status.about: Check if the localcoast DNS resolver is configured
cli.dns.remove.about: Remove the localcoast DNS resolver configuration
cli.daemon.status.about: Check if the daemon is running
cli.daemon.install.about: Register coastd to start automatically at login
cli.ok.daemon_installed: coastd registered to start at login (%{path})
cli.info.daemon_already_installed: coastd is already registered at %{path}. Run `coast daemon uninstall` first to re-install.
cli.info.daemon_not_installed: coastd is not registered for automatic startup.
cli.config.set_language.about: Set the display language for Coast CLI and API
cli.docs.about: List docs tree or print docs markdown content
cli.search_docs.about: Search docs with hybrid semantic + keyword ranking
cli.docs.no_docs_found: No docs files found for this locale.
cli.search_docs.hybrid_note: Search mode: hybrid semantic + keyword (%{strategy}, locale: %{locale})
cli.info.no_running_instances: No running instances found for project '%{project}'.
cli.info.no_stopped_instances: No stopped instances found for project '%{project}'.
cli.info.build_hint: Run `coast build` then `coast run <name>` to get started.
cli.info.no_instances_to_remove: No instances to remove for project '%{project}'.
cli.info.project_resolve_error:
No Coastfile found in the current directory or any parent.
  1. cd into a Coast project directory, or
  2. Pass --project <name> explicitly
cli.hint.dangling_container:
Re-run with --force-remove-dangling to remove the dangling container and proceed:
  coast run %{name} --force-remove-dangling
cli.warn.shared_data_preserved: Shared service data is preserved. Use `coast shared-services db drop` to remove.
clap.missing_required: The following required arguments were not provided:
cli.batch.template_no_count: Name contains '{n}' template but --n was not specified. Provide --n=<count> to create multiple instances, or remove '{n}' from the name for a single instance.
cli.batch.count_no_template: --n was specified but name does not contain '{n}' template. Use a name like 'dev-{n}' so each instance gets a unique name.
cli.git.branch_detect_failed:
Failed to detect current git branch: %{error}
Make sure you are in a git repository.
